What We Do

End-to-End.
Start to Finish.

From a single home system to a 60KW off-grid industrial project — we handle every stage: supply, design, install, commission, maintain, and train. No subcontracting. No shortcuts.

Our Services

Six Ways We Serve You

Whether you need a home backup system or a full EPC project for an institution, every engagement is backed by our 16-year track record and technical depth.

01
Installation

System Installation & Commissioning

We design and install solar and inverter systems for homes, businesses, and institutions, then test and document everything before handover.

  • Site survey and load analysis
  • System sizing and BOQ support
  • Safe installation and cable management
  • Commissioning, testing, and handover documentation
Request this service
02
Maintenance

Maintenance & Repair

Preventive servicing and reactive fault resolution that keep your system stable, efficient, and dependable year after year.

  • Routine maintenance visits
  • Fault diagnostics and repair
  • Battery and inverter health checks
  • SLA agreements for commercial clients
Request this service
03
Assessment

Load Assessment & Technical Advisory

We help you invest wisely — matching the right system to your actual load, usage pattern, and budget before a single component is purchased.

  • Energy audit and load profiling
  • ROI and payback period guidance
  • System specification and BOQ support
  • Brand-neutral advisory for independent buyers
Request this service
04
Supply

Product Supply & Procurement

Panels, inverters, batteries, controllers, and accessories sourced for quality, compatibility, and long-term value from 15+ authorised brands.

  • Solar panels and hybrid inverters
  • Lithium and deep-cycle batteries
  • Charge controllers and protection devices
  • Procurement support for project rollouts
Request this service
05
EPC Projects

Large-Scale EPC Projects

Turnkey engineering, procurement, and construction for institutions, government agencies, and industrial clients. Fully documented delivery.

  • Full project management and site supervision
  • Government and institutional procurement compliance
  • Commissioning reports and handover documentation
  • Multi-site and phased project delivery
Request this service
06
Training

Training & Capacity Building

We train users and technicians so systems perform better and remain easier to manage. The 2026 roadmap includes the TECIL Solar Training Institute.

  • User orientation and system handover training
  • Technician support and troubleshooting courses
  • Maintenance training for commercial teams
  • External and TVET participant programmes
Request this service
How We Work

Simple Process. Zero Surprises.

Every TECIL Solar engagement follows four clear steps. You always know where your project stands — and what comes next.

01

Consultation

We start with a proper conversation about your energy needs, usage pattern, and expectations.

02

Assessment & Design

We carry out load analysis and design a system that matches your real demand — not guesswork.

03

Installation

Our team installs and commissions your system safely with proper documentation.

04

Support

We stay with you after delivery — maintenance, upgrades, and technical support when needed.

Why TECIL

Not Just Sellers. Specialists.

Many companies sell solar equipment. Few can design, install, commission, and maintain a complete system — and stand behind it for years. TECIL Solar does all of this, with certified engineers, documented delivery, and a team on the ground across Nigeria.

34+Documented Projects
15+Authorised Brands
7States Covered
We survey before we quote — no guesswork on your system size
All installations documented with commissioning reports
SLA-based maintenance contracts available for commercial clients
Training Institute pathway in development for 2026–2027
Brand-neutral advisory — we recommend what fits, not what costs more
Warranty honoured in full per manufacturer terms
Ready to Go Solar?

Reliable Power Starts with a Single Call.

Talk to our technical team today. We'll assess your load, recommend the right system, and give you a clear, honest quote. No pressure. No nonsense.
